# Chapter 16: Control of digital systems  (~100 pp)
- 16.1 The discrete-time control problem (12) · 16.2 z-transform (12) · 16.3 Digital control law design (15) · 16.4 Sample-rate selection and aliasing in control (12) · 16.5 Real-time scheduling and jitter (15) · 16.6 Networked control (12) · 16.7 Failure section: networked-control failures (industrial control system attacks, Stuxnet) (22)

**Archetype**: control, transport, failure. **Project**: implement a digital PID; tune for a simulated plant. **Exercises**: 25.
